title: drynaria grossa
intro: Drynaria grossa, also known as the Chinese tuckahoe or Chinese spleenwort, is a type of fern native to Asia and used in traditional medicine for centuries. It is believed to have medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as the ability to improve circulation and immune function. The health benefits of Drynaria grossa include reducing fatigue, improving kidney function, and aiding in the treatment of conditions such as hypertension, diabetes, and certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes of the plant are typically dried and then used to make teas, capsules, or extracts that are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
